items.title: Blood4Blood: BKFC, Danny Wimmer And 5B Take A Swing At Bare-Knuckle And Heavy Metal Fusion
items.description: BKFC and Danny Wimmer Presents are partnering for Blood4Blood, a May 6 event combining bare-knuckle fights and heavy metal in Daytona Beach.

items.title: McDonald’s CEO Eats Burger, Gets Roasted By Burger King In Viral Post
items.description: Recently, a clip known as “McDonald’s CEO eats burger” racked up 145,000 shares in a day for the wrong reasons.

items.title: MacBook Neo Hands-On: The 5 Things Apple Cut To Hit The ‘Breakthrough’ $599 Price Tag
items.description: Apple has revealed the MacBook Neo, its most affordable laptop. Here’s what it looks and feels like in person.

items.title: ‘Marathon’ Deserves To Be More Than Just An Extraction Shooter
items.description: Bungie's new game, Marathon, deserves to have more modes than just the core extraction shooter.
